stories.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
stories.simple_summary: Google made an advertisement imagining what would happen if the people who wrote the Declaration of Independence had used Google's AI tools to help them write it.
stories.why_it_matters: This is just an advertisement — nothing you need to act on. It's Google showing off its tools in a creative way.

stories.title: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Memory Supercycle Is Getting Stronger. Here's How You Can Profit From This Boom With Less Than $100
stories.simple_summary: An investment website is promoting a way to make money from the AI industry boom with a small amount of money.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on. This is about buying stocks, not about AI affecting your daily life.

stories.title: AI security questions loom over NATO summit
stories.simple_summary: Military and political leaders at NATO are worried about security risks from artificial intelligence.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about national defense issues — nothing you need to act on personally or for your small business.

stories.title: AI race weakens climate pledges at Google, Amazon
stories.simple_summary: Google and Amazon are focusing so much on AI development that they may not be following through on their promises to help the environment.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows big companies sometimes choose profit over environmental goals, but it doesn't directly affect how you use their services.

stories.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
stories.simple_summary: A company called Midjourney (which makes AI art tools) is asking Hollywood studios in court to explain how they're using AI themselves.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly interesting to lawyers and Hollywood — nothing you need to worry about.

stories.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
stories.simple_summary: A large Chinese company called Alibaba has told its employees they cannot use a tool called Claude Code because it thinks it's too risky.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to large companies and their employees — it doesn't affect small business owners unless you use Claude Code.

stories.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
stories.simple_summary: A new AI company called Mistral AI is trying to become a major competitor to OpenAI by offering AI tools that lots of people can use.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters mainly to investors and tech companies — consumers will benefit if more competition makes AI tools better and cheaper over time.

stories.title: For one small business, AI was key to a quick start and expansion
stories.simple_summary: A small business used AI tools to help it get started and grow faster.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows AI can help small business owners save time and money — it might be worth exploring how AI could help your own business.

stories.title: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
stories.simple_summary: Writers of fan fiction are arguing with each other about whether people should use AI to help write stories, and some are trying to catch people who use AI.
stories.why_it_matters: If you enjoy reading fan fiction online, you might notice more conflict in those communities, but this doesn't directly affect most people.

stories.title: ‘Who Should I Vote for?’ Voters Turn to A.I. Before Casting Their Ballots
stories.simple_summary: Some voters are asking AI chatbots like ChatGPT to help them decide who to vote for in elections.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're voting soon, be careful about trusting an AI to tell you who to vote for — you should do your own research and thinking on important decisions.

stories.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
stories.simple_summary: A website created a dictionary explaining all the new words and phrases people use when talking about artificial intelligence.
stories.why_it_matters: This could be helpful if you want to understand what people mean when they use confusing AI terminology.

stories.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
stories.simple_summary: An article talks about different web browsers you can use instead of Chrome or Safari.
stories.why_it_matters: This isn't really about AI — it's about web browsers, which is a different topic entirely.
